parameters.description: The body to add to the email
parameters.name: body
parameters.example: This is an email alert from Shuffler.io :)
parameters.value:
Security Alert

A high-severity security event has been detected by the SOC Automation Platform.

Detection: Mimikatz Execution
Severity: High
MITRE ATT&CK: T1003 - OS Credential Dumping

This alert indicates that Mimikatz, a credential dumping tool commonly used by attackers to extract Windows credentials, was executed on a monitored endpoint.

Recommended Actions:
• Verify whether this activity was authorized.
• Investigate the affected endpoint.
• Review related process and authentication logs.
• Isolate the system if malicious activity is confirmed.
• Initiate the incident response procedure.

This notification was automatically generated by the SOC Automation Lab using:

• Sysmon
• Wazuh SIEM
• Shuffle SOAR

Timestamp: Automatically logged by Wazuh.
